briefingZh: SCADA 顯示軸承溫度持續偏離基線。先建立證據鏈，再決定是否隔離與更換備品。
briefingEn: SCADA shows bearing temperature drifting from baseline. Build the evidence chain before isolation and replacement.

operationProfile.workPermitZh: 機械作業與鎖定掛牌許可
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work 或 CTV boat landing；轉運前確認靠泊窗口
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work or CTV boat landing; verify the transfer window before access

learningObjectivesZh: 比較單點警報與趨勢證據
確認隔離前的風險
依故障模式準備備品
learningObjectivesEn: Compare a single alarm with trend evidence
Prepare spares for the failure mode

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 僅依單一溫度警報立即更換軸承
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Replace the bearing from one temperature alarm
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 單點警報不足以排除感測器偏移或負載影響，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: One alarm cannot exclude sensor drift or load effects. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 交叉比對溫度趨勢、振動與負載後確認異常
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Cross-check temperature trend, vibration and load
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 證據鏈完整，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Evidence chain confirmed. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 等待故障停機後再進行檢查
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Wait for a forced outage before inspection
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 延後處置擴大風險，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Delayed action increases exposure. Safety -8.

titleZh: 壓力異常：變槳系統失效
briefingZh: 變槳回路壓力反覆下降。團隊必須確認液壓能量隔離，再更換蓄壓器並驗證復歸。
briefingEn: Pitch circuit pressure repeatedly drops. Isolate hydraulic energy before accumulator replacement and restoration.

operationProfile.workPermitZh: 液壓儲能與雙重隔離許可
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: CTV boat landing 或 SOV walk-to-work；進場前完成零能量確認
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: CTV boat landing or SOV walk-to-work; confirm zero energy before entry

learningObjectivesZh: 辨識液壓儲能風險
執行 LOTO 隔離
以功能測試確認復歸
learningObjectivesEn: Verify restoration with a functional test

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 先洩壓、確認零能量，再檢查蓄壓器
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Depressurize and verify zero energy first
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 隔離順序正確，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Correct isolation sequence. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 保持系統加壓以便快速拆換
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Keep the circuit pressurized for faster replacement
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 暴露於儲能危害，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Stored-energy exposure created. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 只重置控制器，不檢查液壓回路
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Reset the controller without hydraulic checks
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 未處理根因，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Root cause remains unaddressed. Safety -8.

briefingZh: 發電機絕緣指標逐步惡化。完成停電、驗電與測試紀錄後，才能更換冷卻泵並復歸。
briefingEn: Generator insulation indicators are degrading. De-energize, prove dead and record tests before cooling-pump replacement.

operationProfile.weatherEn: Stable dry window with low swell
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 高壓停電、驗電與接地許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: High-voltage isolation, prove-dead and grounding permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；驗電與臨時接地完成後開放機艙
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; open nacelle access only after prove-dead and temporary grounding

learningObjectivesZh: 先停電再驗電
保存絕緣測試證據
復歸前確認冷卻功能

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 完成停電、驗電與接地後進行絕緣測試
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: De-energize, prove dead, ground, then test
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 電氣安全與證據程序正確，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Electrical safety and evidence procedure confirmed. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 在線拆除冷卻泵以縮短停機
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Remove the cooling pump while energized
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 違反電氣隔離原則，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Electrical isolation principle violated. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 只清除 SCADA 告警並恢復運轉
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Clear the SCADA alarm and restore
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 證據不足且未處理劣化，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Evidence is insufficient and degradation remains. Safety -8.

briefingZh: 振動邊帶與油液顆粒同步上升。先排除感測器與負載因素，再安排濾芯與齒輪箱檢查。
briefingEn: Vibration sidebands and oil particles rise together. Exclude sensor and load effects before gearbox intervention.

operationProfile.workPermitZh: 機械作業與鎖定掛牌許可
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；油液取樣與機艙動線分流
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; separate oil-sampling and nacelle work routes

learningObjectivesZh: 整合振動與油液證據
避免只依單一頻譜下結論
規劃齒輪箱檢查窗口

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 比對振動邊帶、油液顆粒與負載工況
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Correlate sidebands, oil particles and load
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 多源證據相互支持，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Multi-source evidence is consistent. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 只看單一峰值便判定齒輪斷裂
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Declare a broken gear from one peak
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 證據不足，可能造成不必要停機，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Evidence is insufficient and may cause unnecessary outage. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 忽略油液結果並提高告警門檻
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Ignore oil results and raise alarm limits
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 掩蓋劣化趨勢，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Degradation is masked. Safety -8.

titleZh: 儲能風險：變槳系統進階
briefingZh: 第二套變槳回路出現間歇性壓降。必須以壓力保持測試定位洩漏，再執行雙重隔離。
briefingEn: A second pitch circuit shows intermittent pressure loss. Locate leakage with a pressure-hold test before dual isolation.

operationProfile.workPermitZh: 液壓儲能與雙重隔離許可
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；液壓壓力歸零後才可進入輪轂
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; hub entry only after hydraulic pressure reaches zero

learningObjectivesZh: 定位間歇性壓降
驗證雙重隔離
比較修復前後壓力保持曲線
learningObjectivesEn: Compare pressure-hold curves before and after repair

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 完成壓力保持測試並驗證雙重隔離
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Run a pressure-hold test and verify dual isolation
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 故障定位與隔離證據完整，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Fault localization and isolation evidence confirmed. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 直接調高液壓壓力補償洩漏
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Raise hydraulic pressure to offset leakage
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 提高儲能與洩漏風險，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Stored-energy and leakage risk increased. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 停用壓力告警後繼續運轉
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Disable the pressure alarm and continue
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 失去保護功能，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: A protection function is lost. Safety -8.

briefingZh: 絕緣趨勢伴隨局部放電指標惡化。團隊需完成停電驗證、比對歷史基線並確認冷卻回路。
briefingEn: Insulation trends worsen with partial-discharge indicators. Prove dead, compare baselines and verify the cooling circuit.

operationProfile.workPermitZh: 高壓停電、驗電與接地許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: High-voltage isolation, prove-dead and grounding permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；高壓區與測試區採雙區管制
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; separate high-voltage and test zones

learningObjectivesZh: 區分雜訊與局部放電趨勢
完成電氣安全驗證
建立修復後基線

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 比對相位解析放電圖、歷史基線與負載
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Compare PRPD, historical baseline and load
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 局部放電證據鏈成立，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Partial-discharge evidence chain established. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 只依瞬時脈衝立即拆解發電機
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Disassemble from one transient pulse
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 可能把雜訊誤判為故障，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Noise may be misclassified as a fault. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 清除紀錄避免影響可用率指標
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Delete records to protect availability metrics
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 破壞證據鏈與追溯性，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Evidence traceability is lost. Safety -8.

titleZh: 多源診斷：嚴重軸承過熱
briefingZh: 主軸承溫升、振動包絡與潤滑指標同時偏離。團隊需先確認量測可信度，再規劃停機檢查與備品更換。
briefingEn: Bearing temperature, vibration envelope and lubrication indicators deviate together. Validate measurement quality before outage inspection and replacement.

operationProfile.workPermitZh: 機械作業與鎖定掛牌許可
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；持續監測 gangway motion envelope
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; continuously monitor the gangway motion envelope

learningObjectivesZh: 驗證多源量測一致性
區分熱負載與軸承劣化
建立更換後驗證基線
learningObjectivesEn: Separate thermal load from bearing degradation

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 校驗感測鏈並同步比對溫度、包絡頻譜與潤滑狀態
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Validate sensing and correlate temperature, envelope spectrum and lubrication
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 多源資料與量測品質均已確認，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Multi-source data and measurement quality confirmed. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 只提高溫度告警門檻以延長運轉
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Raise the temperature alarm limit to extend operation
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 告警門檻變更掩蓋劣化，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: The alarm change masks degradation. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 未校驗感測器便直接拆換主軸承
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Replace the bearing before validating the sensors
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 尚未排除量測誤差，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Measurement error has not been excluded. Safety -8.

titleZh: 控制偏差：嚴重偏航失效
briefingZh: 機艙偏航誤差持續擴大並伴隨煞車溫升。團隊需檢查控制命令、回授與機械阻力，再決定修復順序。
briefingEn: Nacelle yaw error grows with brake temperature. Check commands, feedback and mechanical resistance before choosing a repair sequence.

operationProfile.weatherEn: Dusk gusts with wet deck conditions
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 液壓儲能與雙重隔離許可
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；甲板與輪轂路線分別執行防滑檢查
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; inspect anti-slip controls on deck and hub routes

learningObjectivesZh: 比對偏航命令與位置回授
辨識控制與機械故障邊界
驗證煞車間隙與扭矩
learningObjectivesEn: Compare yaw commands with position feedback

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 同步檢查命令、編碼器回授、馬達電流與煞車間隙
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Check commands, encoder feedback, motor current and brake clearance
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 控制與機械證據鏈可交叉定位，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Control and mechanical evidence can localize the fault. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 停用偏航誤差保護並持續運轉
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Disable yaw-error protection and continue operating
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 失去偏航保護並增加結構負載，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Yaw protection is lost and structural load increases. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 只更換煞車片而不讀取控制回授
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Replace brake pads without reviewing control feedback
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 未釐清控制器或回授異常，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Controller and feedback faults remain unresolved. Safety -8.

titleZh: 停電驗證：嚴重絕緣劣化
briefingZh: 發電機絕緣電阻、局部放電與冷卻效率同時惡化。完成停電驗電、接地與基線比對後，才能執行修復。
briefingEn: Insulation resistance, partial discharge and cooling efficiency degrade together. Prove dead, ground and compare baselines before repair.

operationProfile.weatherEn: Low light, humidity and intermittent gusts
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 高壓停電、驗電與接地許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: High-voltage isolation, prove-dead and grounding permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；測試設備與接地點採雙人覆核
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; two-person verification for test equipment and grounding points

learningObjectivesZh: 完成停電驗電與接地
整合絕緣與局部放電證據
驗證冷卻回路修復成效

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 完成 LOTO、驗電、接地後再比對絕緣與局部放電基線
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Apply LOTO, prove dead and ground before comparing insulation and PD baselines
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 電氣安全與診斷順序完整，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Electrical safety and diagnostic sequence confirmed. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 帶電量測內部端子以縮短停機
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Probe internal terminals while energized to shorten outage
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 暴露於高壓電氣危害，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: High-voltage exposure created. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 更換冷卻泵後略過絕緣復測
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Skip insulation retest after replacing the cooling pump
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 缺少復歸證據，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Restoration evidence is missing. Safety -8.

briefingZh: 主軸承溫度與振動快速升高，天候窗口與備品到場時間同時惡化。團隊必須先控制失效擴展風險，再建立停機與更換方案。
briefingEn: Main-bearing temperature and vibration rise rapidly while the weather window and spare arrival worsen. Control propagation risk before planning the outage and replacement.

operationProfile.weatherEn: Strong night crosswind with rising seas
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 夜間機械作業與鎖定掛牌許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: Night mechanical work and LOTO permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；夜間轉運需照明與雙人通訊監看
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; night transfer requires lighting and two-person communication watch

learningObjectivesZh: 判斷危急軸承事件的停機時點
整合天候與備品延誤風險
規劃受控更換與復歸驗證
learningObjectivesEn: Determine outage timing for a critical bearing event
Plan controlled replacement and restoration verification

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 確認量測可信度、立即降低風險並依天候與備品狀態安排停機
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Validate measurements, reduce risk immediately and schedule outage around weather and spares
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 危急風險、證據與後勤條件已整合，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Critical risk, evidence and logistics are integrated. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 提高告警門檻並等待下一次定期保養
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Raise alarm limits and wait for the next scheduled service
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 危急劣化可能持續擴展，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Critical degradation may continue to propagate. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 未確認吊運與天候條件便立即拆解
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Begin disassembly before confirming lift and weather conditions
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 海事與吊運風險尚未受控，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Marine and lifting risks remain uncontrolled. Safety -8.

briefingZh: 偏航系統在高負載下失去穩定回授，並出現通訊中斷與次生告警。團隊需建立安全狀態、驗證現場量測並重建控制證據鏈。
briefingEn: The yaw system loses stable feedback under high load with communication loss and secondary alarms. Establish a safe state, verify field measurements and rebuild the control evidence chain.

operationProfile.weatherZh: 夜間陣風、甲板週期運動
operationProfile.weatherEn: Night gusts with cyclic deck motion
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 夜間液壓儲能與雙重隔離許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: Night hydraulic stored-energy and dual-isolation permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；gangway 與輪轂入口採單向人流
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; one-way personnel flow at gangway and hub entrance

learningObjectivesZh: 在通訊中斷時維持安全狀態
區分真實故障與錯誤告警
完成偏航控制鏈復歸測試
learningObjectivesEn: Maintain a safe state during communication loss
Separate real faults from false alarms

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 保持停止狀態，以獨立量測核對命令、回授、電流與煞車間隙
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Maintain stopped state and independently verify commands, feedback, current and brake clearance
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 安全狀態與控制證據鏈均已建立，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: A safe state and control evidence chain are established. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 通訊恢復前反覆遠端啟動偏航測試
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Repeatedly start remote yaw tests before communications recover
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 無法確認人員位置與停止能力，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Personnel location and stop capability cannot be confirmed. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 直接更換控制器並忽略機械阻力證據
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Replace the controller and ignore evidence of mechanical resistance
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 控制與機械故障邊界仍未釐清，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: The control-mechanical fault boundary remains unresolved. Safety -8.

briefingZh: 發電機絕緣與局部放電指標進入危急區間，冷卻回路亦失去效率。團隊需完成高壓安全隔離、修復與可追溯的復電審查。
briefingEn: Generator insulation and partial-discharge indicators enter a critical range while cooling efficiency is lost. Complete high-voltage isolation, repair and a traceable energization review.

operationProfile.weatherEn: Night low cloud, salt mist and strong wind
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 夜間高壓停電、驗電與接地許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: Night high-voltage isolation, prove-dead and grounding permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；夜間高壓區需雙人進出與接地覆核
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; two-person high-voltage access and grounding verification at night

learningObjectivesZh: 執行危急電氣事件的隔離程序
整合絕緣、局部放電與冷卻證據
完成可追溯的復電條件審查
learningObjectivesEn: Execute isolation for a critical electrical event
Integrate insulation, PD and cooling evidence

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 完成 LOTO、驗電與接地，修復後核對量測、保護設定及復電清單
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Apply LOTO, prove dead and ground, then verify measurements, protection settings and the energization checklist
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 危急電氣作業與復歸證據完整，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Critical electrical work and restoration evidence are complete. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 只更換冷卻泵並立即復電測試
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Replace only the cooling pump and energize immediately
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 絕緣與保護狀態尚未確認，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Insulation and protection status remain unverified. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 為縮短停機而省略接地與復電審查
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Skip grounding and energization review to shorten outage
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 高壓安全程序不完整，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: The high-voltage safety process is incomplete. Safety -8.

briefingZh: 主軸承溫升、振動與潤滑劣化同時跨越停機邊界，且天候、備品與次生故障快速惡化。團隊必須建立事件指揮、控制熱失控並完成可稽核的更換與復歸。
briefingEn: Bearing temperature, vibration and lubrication cross the shutdown boundary while weather, spares and secondary faults deteriorate. Establish incident command, arrest thermal runaway and complete an auditable replacement and restoration.

operationProfile.weatherZh: 對流雨帶接近、海況快速惡化
operationProfile.weatherEn: Approaching squall line with rapidly deteriorating seas
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 危急機械處置與緊急撤離許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: Critical mechanical response and emergency egress permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；設定撤離觸發點並保持 gangway 待命
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; define egress triggers and keep the gangway on standby

learningObjectivesZh: 建立災厄事件的指揮與停機邊界
在多重壓力下維持量測證據可信度
完成軸承更換後的受控復歸
learningObjectivesEn: Establish incident command and shutdown boundaries
Maintain evidence quality under concurrent pressures
Complete controlled restoration after bearing replacement

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 宣布受控停機，交叉驗證熱、振動與潤滑證據，並依天候與備品狀態執行更換
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Declare a controlled shutdown, cross-check thermal, vibration and lubrication evidence, then replace around weather and spare readiness
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 事件指揮、停機邊界與證據鏈一致，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Incident command, shutdown boundary and evidence chain are aligned. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 提高溫度與振動告警門檻以維持發電
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Raise temperature and vibration alarm limits to maintain generation
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 熱失控與失效擴展風險被掩蓋，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Thermal runaway and propagation risk are masked. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 在天候與吊運計畫未核准前拆卸主軸承
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Remove the main bearing before weather and lifting plans are approved
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 吊運、海事與設備穩定條件不足，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Lifting, marine and equipment-stability conditions are inadequate. Safety -8.

titleZh: 災厄應變：偏航聯鎖失效
briefingZh: 偏航命令、位置回授與煞車狀態互相矛盾，通訊與保護聯鎖亦不穩定。團隊需先建立機組安全姿態，再分離控制、機械與結構載荷問題。
briefingEn: Yaw commands, position feedback and brake state conflict while communications and protective interlocks are unstable. Establish a safe turbine posture before separating control, mechanical and structural-load faults.

operationProfile.weatherZh: 陣風增強、重吊甲板週期運動
operationProfile.weatherEn: Strengthening gusts with heavy-lift deck motion
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 危急液壓隔離與聯鎖復歸許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: Critical hydraulic isolation and interlock restoration permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；重吊甲板與輪轂聯鎖採雙重通訊確認
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; dual communication confirmation between heavy-lift deck and hub interlocks

learningObjectivesZh: 失去通訊時建立偏航安全姿態
驗證聯鎖與獨立停止能力
整合控制證據與結構載荷邊界
learningObjectivesEn: Establish a safe yaw posture during communication loss
Verify interlocks and independent stopping capability
Integrate control evidence with structural-load boundaries

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 維持停止與人員淨空，以獨立量測核對聯鎖、命令、回授、煞車與結構載荷
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Maintain stop and personnel clearance while independently verifying interlocks, commands, feedback, brakes and structural loads
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 控制、機械與結構邊界已在安全狀態下釐清，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Control, mechanical and structural boundaries are resolved in a safe state. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 繞過聯鎖並反覆遠端驅動偏航以尋找異音
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Bypass interlocks and repeatedly drive yaw remotely to locate noise
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 人員位置、停止能力與載荷均不可控，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Personnel location, stopping capability and loads are uncontrolled. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 只依單一錯誤告警更換控制器
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Replace the controller from a single contradictory alarm
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 未排除通訊、回授與機械阻力問題，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Communications, feedback and mechanical resistance remain unexcluded. Safety -8.

briefingZh: 發電機絕緣、局部放電、冷卻與保護設定同時進入災厄狀態。這是最終復歸審查：團隊必須完成隔離、修復、獨立驗證、復電授權與受控試運轉。
briefingEn: Generator insulation, partial discharge, cooling and protection settings enter a catastrophic state together. This final restoration review requires isolation, repair, independent verification, energization authority and controlled commissioning.

operationProfile.weatherZh: 雷雨前緣、低雲與強陣風
operationProfile.weatherEn: Thunderstorm boundary with low cloud and strong gusts
operationProfile.workPermitZh: 危急高壓隔離、接地與緊急撤離許可
operationProfile.workPermitEn: Critical high-voltage isolation, grounding and emergency egress permit
operationProfile.accessRequirementZh: SOV walk-to-work；高壓區維持雙人監看並設定撤離時限
operationProfile.accessRequirementEn: SOV walk-to-work; maintain two-person high-voltage watch and a timed egress trigger

learningObjectivesZh: 整合災厄電氣故障的安全隔離與診斷
建立獨立復電審查與授權證據
以受控試運轉完成 Campaign 最終復歸
learningObjectivesEn: Integrate safe isolation and diagnosis for a catastrophic electrical fault
Build independent energization-review and authorization evidence
Complete the Campaign through controlled commissioning

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 完成 LOTO、驗電與接地，獨立複核絕緣、局部放電、冷卻、保護設定及復電授權後受控試運轉
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Apply LOTO, prove dead and ground, independently verify insulation, PD, cooling, protection settings and energization authority, then commission under control
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 最終安全、技術與授權證據鏈完整，Evidence +15。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: The final safety, technical and authorization evidence chain is complete. Evidence +15.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 修復冷卻回路後直接復電，以運轉結果取代絕緣檢測
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Energize after cooling repair and use operation to replace insulation testing
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 高壓故障狀態與保護設定仍未確認，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: High-voltage fault condition and protection settings remain unverified. Safety -8.

diagnosisOptions.labelZh: 由單一人員同時執行檢測、核准與復電
diagnosisOptions.labelEn: Let one person perform testing, authorization and energization
diagnosisOptions.feedbackZh: 缺少獨立審查與授權分工，安全 -8。
diagnosisOptions.feedbackEn: Independent review and authorization separation are missing. Safety -8.
